ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter (e.g., F20, S21) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quarter */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year the quarter belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the course level (e.g., Undergraduate, Graduate) */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* Reference to the department head's instructor ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., ED L 321F) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course level */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES course_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade (e.g., A, B, S) */,
  "grade_value" REAL /* Numeric value of the grade for GPA calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor relationship */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quarter */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_grades" (
  "course_grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-grade distribution */,
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course-instructor relationship */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grade */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students receiving the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_grades_course_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_instructor_id") REFERENCES course_instructors ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_grades_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student's course level */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES course_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course-instructor relationship */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grade received */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of withdrawal, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_instructor_id") REFERENCES course_instructors ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Instructor, Student) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for secure access */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
